factions.name: Commerce Guild
factions.description: A powerful consortium of traders and merchants controlling major trade routes.

factions.name: Miners Union
factions.description: A rugged alliance of miners and resource extractors working the frontier.

factions.name: Science Collective
factions.description: An academic coalition pursuing knowledge and technological advancement.

factions.name: Frontier Alliance
factions.description: A coalition of settlers, farmers, and frontier communities.

factions.name: Crimson Reach
factions.description: The lawless fringe sector anchored by the Wreckers' Guild. No formal government; the Guild is the closest thing to authority here.
